issue.title: yande.re
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [NSFW] [https://yande.re/post](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fyande.re%2Fpost) ### Comment > AdGuard is blocking image content on yande.re, even though it’s not an advertisement. ### [NSFW] Screenshots [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2ujtq2ar03ggs80o440gwsossowgs88slvy4lh9pqo.png?nc=1) [Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ri6gx3i607404g8sc440woc0kwg4cwoslw2sld9vgg.png?nc=1) ### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Windows v7.22.5 (5262) System version: | `Microsoft Windows NT 10.0.26200.0` Browser: | Firefox License type: | paid AdGuard driver: | WFP Tracking protection: | **General settings**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Hide your search queries,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180)

**Browser API**:
Block Flash

**Windows tracking**:
Disable Windows Telemetry,
Turn off Advertising ID,
Disable Windows Defender automatic samples submission

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests,
Protect against DPI DNS filtering: | server: `https://dns.adguard-dns.com/dns-query`
